data.title: Polymarket's Insiders Bot Launches Full Web Version
data.description:
On April 14, Polymarket's Insiders bot announced the launch of its full web version. According to BlockBeats, this platform offers Polymarket traders real-time tracking of insider wallet signals, one-click smart copy trading, and a professional trading panel with stop-loss and take-profit features. The aim is to enable regular users to replicate the profits of smart money and surpass them through strategy optimization.

The new web version introduces additional features compared to the previous Telegram and Beta web versions. These include backtesting and optimization settings for copy trading strategies, a market data analysis dashboard, and a multi-market monitoring panel. Enhancements have also been made to security and trading execution speed.

data.title: The People's Daily published an article criticizing the practice of using false profit information to attract popularity, such as the "100x coin" scam.
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily reports that the People's Daily published an article titled "These Irregularities in Financial Self-Media Accounts Disrupting the Capital Market Need to Be Wary Of," specifically naming some accounts that are using false information such as "100x returns" and "making millions a month trading cryptocurrencies" to drive traffic to cryptocurrency trading. The article again cites a previous notice from eight departments including the People's Bank of China, emphasizing that cryptocurrency-related business activities are illegal financial activities, and points out that accounts and platforms providing traffic and technical services for illegal cryptocurrency trading are suspected of violating laws and regulations, potentially threatening financial security and anti-money laundering efforts.

data.title: Flare Governance Proposal Aims to Reduce Inflation and Enhance Network Sustainability
data.description:
Flare's governance proposal FIP.16 is set to open for voting on April 17. According to Foresight News, the proposal's main objectives are to significantly reduce inflation, establish a revenue reinvestment mechanism, and enhance staking incentives, aiming to shift the FLR token from inflationary to potentially deflationary, thereby strengthening the network's long-term sustainability and security.

The proposal includes an immediate reduction of the annual inflation rate from 5% to 3%, a 40% decrease. It also plans to establish the Flare Income Reinvestment Entity (FIRE) to collect and redistribute network income, including FDC fees, FAssets minting/redemption fees, FCC, and MEV. Additionally, the proposal suggests a substantial increase in the base transaction fee from 25 gwei to 500 gwei to increase FLR burn, with an estimated annual burn of approximately 300 million FLR.

The staking incentive mechanism will be adjusted to prioritize P-chain staking, with a weight five times that of C-chain delegation. The maximum staking limit for a single validator will be raised to 300 million FLR, and entities will be required to receive a minimum of 20% of the fees.

data.title: Kalshi to Launch New Product on April 27
data.description:
Kalshi, a prediction platform, announced on April 14 that it will unveil a new product on April 27. According to BlockBeats, a video teaser released by Kalshi features a green spiral forming a perpetual loop, culminating in the word 'Timeless.'

The community speculates that this update might introduce a perpetual prediction market without expiration dates, potentially enhancing trading flexibility by surpassing the existing event contract limitations.

data.title: Ethereum Transactions Surge 41% Amid Decline in Stablecoin Activity
data.description: Daily Ethereum transactions increased by 41% from the previous week, reaching approximately 3.6 million, according to NS3.AI. Despite this rise in Ethereum activity, stablecoin transfer volume and associated fees experienced a decline during the same period.

data.title: Pakistan Urges Extension of U.S.-Iran Ceasefire Agreement
data.description: On April 14, local time, Pakistan has called for the extension of the ceasefire agreement between the United States and Iran by 45 days. According to BlockBeats, diplomatic sources from Pakistan revealed that the current ceasefire agreement is set to expire on April 22. Since the conclusion of the last negotiations, Pakistan has engaged in discussions with various parties to form a broad coalition aimed at extending the ceasefire or resuming technical-level contacts to pave the way for a second round of political talks. Mediators have been assisting both the U.S. and Iran in exchanging information on unresolved issues, with the hope of persuading both sides to extend the ceasefire period by at least 45 days.

data.title: AI TRENDS | OpenAI's $852 Billion Valuation Questioned by Investors
data.description: OpenAI's investors are expressing concerns over the company's valuation, which stands at $852 billion. According to Jin10, these investors believe that OpenAI's strategic shifts could potentially expose it to competition from companies like Anthropic and Google. The apprehensions arise as OpenAI continues to navigate the rapidly evolving AI landscape, where maintaining a competitive edge is crucial. Investors are closely monitoring how these strategic changes might impact OpenAI's market position and its ability to fend off emerging threats from its rivals.

data.title: BitMart contracts will be listed on ANDURILUSDT, KALSHIUSDT, and POLYMARKETUSDT.
data.description: According to an official announcement, BitMart will launch perpetual contracts for ANDURILUSDT, KALSHIUSDT, and POLYMARKETUSDT on April 14, 2026 at 15:00 (UTC+8), supporting leverage up to 10x.

data.title: U.S. Vice President Vance Condemns Iran's Strait of Hormuz Closure as 'Economic Terrorism'
data.description: U.S. Vice President Vance has labeled Iran's decision to close the Strait of Hormuz as 'economic terrorism.' According to NS3.AI, Vance defended a potential U.S. blockade of Iranian ports in response. He stated that Iran's actions pose a threat to all ships navigating the strait and warned that if Iran continues with this strategy, no Iranian vessel would be permitted to depart.

data.title: Data: Bitget ranks first in holdings of the Nasdaq 100 ETF (QQQ) contract, accounting for 36% of the total holdings across the network.
data.description: According to data from CoinGlass, the total open interest of the Nasdaq 100 ETF (QQQ) contracts across all exchanges reached $11.1726 million. The top five exchanges by open interest are: Bitget (36.37%), Binance (23.42%), Lighter (10.25%), Bitunix (8.67%), and OKX (7.93%).

data.title: Crypto Industry Faces Challenges, Calls for Innovative Solutions
data.description: The crypto industry has faced a challenging year, prompting calls for innovative solutions to improve the situation. According to PANews, Nikita Bier, the product head at X platform, expressed the need for new products to address the current difficulties in the sector.

data.title: Vance on Iran's closure of the Strait of Hormuz: We can play this game too.
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily reports that US Vice President Vance accused Iran of "economic terrorism" by closing the Strait of Hormuz and defended the US blockade of Iranian ports, calling it a reciprocal response. Vance stated that Iran's blockade of the Strait of Hormuz amounted to "economic terrorism against the whole world." "They've essentially threatened every ship that passes through the Strait of Hormuz." "As the US president has shown, we can play this game too," he added. "If the Iranians want to engage in 'economic terrorism,' we will also adhere to a simple principle: no Iranian ship will leave." (CNN)

data.title: Product Manager X: The crypto market has had a tough year, and new projects may be launched to improve the situation.
data.description: According to Odaily Planet Daily, Nikita Bier, product manager at X, posted on the X platform that the crypto market has had a tough year and perhaps it should launch new projects to improve the situation.

data.title: Trade.xyz Founder Reveals Insights Amid Rapid Growth
data.description:
On April 14, Trade.xyz, a leading project within the Hyperliquid ecosystem, has been experiencing significant growth. According to BlockBeats, the team behind Trade.xyz has maintained a low profile and an air of mystery. Recently, during an interview with Hyperliquid founder Jeff, the founder of Trade.xyz shared some rare insights about himself.

The founder, who wishes to remain anonymous, disclosed that he purchased his first Bitcoin in 2013 for $66. Over the years, he has participated in the cryptocurrency space primarily as an investor rather than a builder. Initially, he had no plans to establish a company. He stated, "Hyperliquid has the potential to save cryptocurrency, and if I hadn't met Jeff, I might have already left the crypto industry."

data.title: Circle Explores Token Issuance for Arc Network
data.description: Circle's founder and CEO, Jeremy Allaire, announced during an event in Seoul, South Korea, that the company is considering issuing a token for the Arc Network, a stablecoin payment blockchain under development. According to Odaily, Allaire stated that the token would facilitate governance, incentives, and economic alignment, with plans to transition the network to a Proof of Stake (PoS) system. Further details are expected to be released soon.

data.title: China's Currency Gains Attention Amid Iran Conflict
data.description: The ongoing conflict in Iran is generating renewed interest in China's currency as a potential competitor to the US dollar. Bloomberg posted on X, highlighting the geopolitical tensions that are influencing global currency dynamics. Analysts suggest that the situation may lead to increased reliance on the Chinese yuan, as nations seek alternatives to the dollar amid uncertainties. The developments in Iran are prompting discussions on the future of currency markets and the role of China's financial system in global trade. Observers are closely monitoring how these shifts might impact international economic relations and currency strategies.

data.title: Binance to Delist Margin Trading Pairs for BAR, PIVX, and XVG
data.description:
According to the announcement from Binance, the platform will delist and cease trading on all margin trading pairs for FC Barcelona Fan Token (BAR), PIVX (PIVX), and Verge (XVG) on 2026-04-17 at 06:00 (UTC). This decision affects both cross margin and isolated margin trading pairs for these tokens. Users are advised to repay any outstanding loans before the automatic closure to avoid potential losses. The delisting schedule may vary depending on the association of these tokens with other products.

Loan services will also be impacted. At the specified time, Flexible Loan will close all outstanding loan positions for these tokens as loanable and collateral tokens. Similarly, VIP Loan will close positions for these tokens as collateral. Users are encouraged to manage their loans proactively to prevent automatic closures.

For margin trading, Binance Margin will suspend borrowings on cross margin and isolated margin pairs for these tokens starting 2026-04-14 at 06:00 (UTC). At the Margin Scheduled Delisting Time, positions will be closed, automatic settlements conducted, and pending orders canceled. Users holding both collateral and liabilities of these tokens on cross margin will have their collateral used to repay liabilities. If collateral remains, it will be sold, and if liabilities remain, other collateral tokens will be sold to repay them.

Portfolio Margin users should note that any remaining tokens in their accounts after the delisting will be automatically liquidated and sold for USDT. Users are advised to transfer these tokens to their Spot Accounts and monitor their Unified Maintenance Margin Ratio closely to avoid liquidation. Binance emphasizes the importance of managing positions and assets before the delisting to mitigate risks.

data.title: SHARE Secures Seed Funding Led by Greenfield Capital
data.description: Decentralized physical infrastructure network SHARE has successfully completed its seed funding round. According to Foresight News, the round was led by Greenfield Capital, with participation from Kosmos Ventures, Generative Ventures, Zee Prime Capital, and other strategic funds and angel investors. The specific amount raised in the funding round has not been disclosed.

data.title: Circle's founder has confirmed that Arc Network will issue its own cryptocurrency; more details will be revealed later.
data.description: During a speech at an offline event in Seoul, South Korea, Circle founder and CEO Jeremy Allaire stated (video 31:11): "We are exploring issuing a token for Arc Network (Circle's stablecoin payment public chain) to align governance, incentives, and economic benefits, and to gradually transition it to a PoS system. We hope to announce more details in the near future."

data.title: Daniel Moreno-Gama Faces Charges for Attempted Murder and Explosive Threats
data.description: Daniel Moreno-Gama has been charged with attempted murder following an attack on Sam Altman's residence last week. According to NS3.AI, federal prosecutors have also accused Moreno-Gama of attempting to use explosives to damage property and illegally possessing an unregistered firearm.
